headline: Whistleblower Protection Act covers only 15 cases
context: Since its enactment in 2010, the Whistleblower Protection Act has been applied to protect only 15 individuals, according to 2025 parliamentary data.

cards.big: Only 15 whistleblowers formally protected under 2010 Act in 15 years
cards.sub: Narrow scope and complex requirements deter potential whistleblowers

cards.big: WPA 2010 Section 6 requires disclosure to enforcement agencies, not media
cards.sub: Protection revoked if whistleblower participates in the reported misconduct

cards.big: Transparency International ranked Malaysia 57th on Corruption Perception Index 2024
cards.sub: Effective whistleblower systems are key to anti-corruption infrastructure

cards.big: Survey found 76% of Malaysian civil servants fear retaliation for reporting
cards.sub: Without robust protection, systemic corruption continues unreported

cards.big: 15 protected whistleblowers in 15 years means the law fails its purpose
C4 and TI-Malaysia proposed 12 amendments to strengthen the WPA in 2024
